dts.title: DVSA just admitted the 7-week target is dead — here's how to skip the queue anyway
dts.hook: On-screen graphic: 'Average wait: 22 weeks' fades in, then 'or... 3 weeks with a swap'
dts.caption_cue: DVSA confirmed this week they won't hit their summer target. Learners are waiting 22+ weeks. DrivingTestSwap finds cancellations so you don't have to. Link in bio.

dts.title: POV: You just moved your driving test 3 months earlier
dts.hook: Start with phone notification sound, show a mock 'test date confirmed' message, then relief reaction
dts.caption_cue: The feeling when DrivingTestSwap alerts you to a cancellation at your nearest centre. Stop refreshing the DVSA booking page manually. Let the swap work for you.

athletics.title: 30-Day Sprint + Calisthenics Combo: Week 1 baseline
athletics.hook: Film Dowayne at the track doing 3x30m sprints + 10 explosive pull-ups; overlay split time in text
athletics.caption_cue: Week 1 baseline locked in. 30 days of pairing heavy calisthenics with short sprints to test how upper-body power transfers to start speed. Following along? Drop your 30m time below.

athletics.title: The pull-up → sprint finisher that's changing my acceleration
athletics.hook: Start mid-set on a weighted pull-up, cut immediately to 20m sprint — show the neural connection
athletics.caption_cue: Most sprinters only train legs. I've been pairing max-effort pull-up sets with 20m acceleration runs and the carry-over to drive phase is real. Here's the exact protocol I use.
athletics.cta: Save this and try it next session

aimybiz.format: LinkedIn Text Post with bullet breakdown
aimybiz.title: 3 objections your reps are losing on right now (and the AI drill that fixes each one)
aimybiz.hook: 'We're already using someone else.' 'Now isn't a good time.' 'Send me some info.' — your reps hear these daily and they're still fumbling them.
aimybiz.caption_cue: Here are the 3 most common deal-killing objections in B2B sales and exactly how CloseCoach trains reps to handle each one through repetition — not scripts. [Bullet 1] 'We use someone else' → reframe drill. [Bullet 2] 'Not right now' → urgency builder drill. [Bullet 3] 'Just send info' → commitment micro-ask drill.
aimybiz.cta: Tag a sales manager who needs to see this
